description: A faithful round mechanical penguin Codex pet with a sky-blue worn metal shell, cream belly, warm yellow glowing eyes, yellow beak and feet, pink cheeks, and two tiny pale-blue robot fish hugged tightly in its short arms.

idle.notes: Quiet breathing idle with a soft eye-glow flicker while both fish stay snug in the hug.

walk.notes: Short careful directional waddle that keeps both fish hugged securely.

curious.notes: Small attentive head tilt and observant lean without loosening the hug.

happy.notes: Warm pleased bounce with a tiny beak smile while still cuddling the fish.

sleep.notes: Main cozy sleep loop with closed eyes and slow breathing while hugging both fish.

cuddle.notes: Extra snug cuddle loop with a tiny upward bob and tighter fish squeeze.

probe.notes: In-place cuddle-shuffle that resettles the fish without directional travel.

deep_rest.notes: Deeper low-power sleepy curl with a heavier tucked posture.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows so the beak, body, arms, and fish all match the drag direction.

cuddle.notes: Fixed atlas spare row used as an explicit cuddle state.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the left-facing walk row
right drag uses the right-facing walk row
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, beak, body, arms, feet, and both fish stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
